SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.text

Class RichTextBuilderExtBase<N,B extends RichTextBuilderExtBase<N,B>>

java.lang.Object
com.dua3.utility.text.RichTextBuilder
com.dua3.utility.text.RichTextBuilderExtBase<N,B>
Type Parameters:
N - node type
B - concrete builder type
All Implemented Interfaces:
RichTextRuns, ToRichText, Appendable, CharSequence, Iterable<Run>
Direct Known Subclasses:
RichTextBuilderFx
public abstract class RichTextBuilderExtBase<N,B extends RichTextBuilderExtBase<N,B>> extends RichTextBuilder
Base class for rich-text builders with support for additional features, including inline nodes.

    Class

    Decoded button payload values.

  • Constructor Details

    • RichTextBuilderExtBase

      protected RichTextBuilderExtBase()
      Protected constructor for the RichTextBuilderExtBase class.

    • RichTextBuilderExtBase

      protected RichTextBuilderExtBase(int capacity)
      Constructs a RichTextBuilderExtBase instance with the specified initial capacity.
      Parameters:
      capacity - the initial capacity of the internal buffer

  • Method Details

    • self

      protected final B self()
      Description copied from class: RichTextBuilder
      Returns the current instance of the RichTextBuilder. This method is commonly used to provide a fluent interface for method chaining and must be overridden by subclasses.
      Overrides:
      self in class RichTextBuilder
      Returns:
      this RichTextBuilder instance

    • createHyperlink

      protected abstract N createHyperlink(CharSequence text, URI uri)
      Creates a hyperlink node with the specified text and target URI.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to be displayed for the hyperlink
      uri - hyperlink target URI
      Returns:
      the created hyperlink node

    • createButton

      protected abstract N createButton(CharSequence text, Runnable action)
      Creates a button node with the specified text and action.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to display on the button
      action - the action to execute when the button is activated
      Returns:
      the newly created button node

    • createImage

      protected abstract N createImage(Image image)
      Creates an inline node representation for the provided image.
      Parameters:
      image - the image to be added as an inline node
      Returns:
      the newly created inline node representing the image

    • createImage

      protected abstract N createImage(Image image, float maxWidth, float maxHeight)
      Creates an inline image node from the given image, scaled to fit within the specified maximum width and height.
      Parameters:
      image - the image to create an inline node for
      maxWidth - the maximum width to scale the image to
      maxHeight - the maximum height to scale the image to
      Returns:
      the created image node

    • appendInlineNode

      public B appendInlineNode(Supplier<? extends N> node)
      Appends an inline node to the rich-text content using a Supplier.
      Parameters:
      node - a Supplier that provides the node to append
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • appendHyperlink

      public B appendHyperlink(CharSequence text, URI uri)
      Appends a hyperlink to the rich-text content. The hyperlink is displayed with the specified text and targets the provided URI when activated.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to display for the hyperlink
      uri - hyperlink target URI
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • encodeInlineHyperlinkData

      public static byte[] encodeInlineHyperlinkData(CharSequence target, CharSequence text)
      Encodes inline hyperlink payload data.
      Parameters:
      target - hyperlink target URI/string
      text - hyperlink label text
      Returns:
      encoded payload bytes

    • decodeInlineHyperlinkData

      public static RichTextBuilderExtBase.HyperlinkData decodeInlineHyperlinkData(byte[] data)
      Decodes inline hyperlink payload data.

      Falls back to legacy payloads that only stored link text in UTF-8 bytes.

      Parameters:
      data - payload bytes
      Returns:
      decoded hyperlink data

    • encodeInlineButtonData

      public static byte[] encodeInlineButtonData(CharSequence target, CharSequence text)
      Encodes inline button payload data.
      Parameters:
      target - fallback hyperlink target URI/string
      text - button label text
      Returns:
      encoded payload bytes

    • decodeInlineButtonData

      public static RichTextBuilderExtBase.ButtonData decodeInlineButtonData(byte[] data)
      Decodes inline button payload data.

      Falls back to legacy payloads that only stored button text in UTF-8 bytes.

      Parameters:
      data - payload bytes
      Returns:
      decoded button data

    • createInlineButtonFallbackUri

      public static URI createInlineButtonFallbackUri(CharSequence text)
      Creates a fallback URI used when serializing inline buttons to RTF hyperlinks.
      Parameters:
      text - button label text
      Returns:
      fallback URI

    • appendButton

      public B appendButton(CharSequence text, Runnable action)
      Appends a button to the rich-text content. The button is displayed with the specified text and executes the provided action when activated.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to display on the button
      action - the action to execute when the button is activated
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • appendImage

      public B appendImage(Image image)
      Appends an image as inline node using the image's original size.
      Parameters:
      image - image
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • appendImage

      public B appendImage(Image image, VAnchor vAnchor)
      Appends an image as inline node using the image's original size.
      Parameters:
      image - image
      vAnchor - vertical anchor for image alignment in the text line
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • appendImage

      public B appendImage(Image image, float maxWidth, float maxHeight)
      Appends an image as inline node scaled to fit inside the given maximum width and height.
      Parameters:
      image - image
      maxWidth - maximum width
      maxHeight - maximum height
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • appendImage

      public B appendImage(Image image, float maxWidth, float maxHeight, VAnchor vAnchor)
      Appends an image as inline node scaled to fit inside the given maximum width and height.
      Parameters:
      image - image
      maxWidth - maximum width
      maxHeight - maximum height
      vAnchor - vertical anchor for image alignment in the text line
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • appendInlineNodeWithStyle

      protected B appendInlineNodeWithStyle(Supplier<InlineNode<? extends N>> inlineNodeSupplier)
      Appends an inline node to the rich-text content with a specific style. This method creates a temporary style to apply while appending the inline node.
      Parameters:
      inlineNodeSupplier - a Supplier that provides the inline node to append
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • appendInlineNodeWithStyle

      protected B appendInlineNodeWithStyle(Supplier<InlineNode<? extends N>> inlineNodeSupplier, VAnchor vAnchor, double descent)
      Appends an inline node to the rich-text content with a specific style that includes vertical alignment and descent properties. This method creates a temporary style to apply while appending the inline node.
      Parameters:
      inlineNodeSupplier - a Supplier that provides the inline node to append
      vAnchor - the vertical anchor point for aligning the node in the text line
      descent - the descent value to adjust the vertical alignment for the node
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining
